LanguageData.JanitorsCloset.CleaningTool.WrongFilthCa: Tool not suited to this filth
LanguageData.JanitorsCloset.CleaningTool.SpecialtyExp: The cleaning speed bonus from this tool only applies to dry filth. Wet filth is cleaned at regular speed.
The cleaning speed bonus from this tool only applies to wet filth. Dry filth is cleaned at regular speed.
The cleaning speed bonus from this tool only applies while clearing polluted terrain. Ordinary filth is cleaned at regular speed.
This tool dematerialises the entire filth stack on the target tile in a single pass, not just the topmost piece.
LanguageData.JanitorsCloset.Settings.DebugLoggingTool: Log per-tick decisions about cleaning-tool sound swaps and CleaningSpeed/GeneralLaborSpeed adjustments. Verbose — turn on only when investigating an issue.
